name: Laon Burst
shortDesc: Premium diesel engine oil for trucks and heavy equipment. Maximum durability under extreme conditions.
description: The Bagani Laon Burst is a premium diesel engine oil built for trucks, heavy equipment, and commercial vehicles. The 15W-40 CI-4 formulation delivers maximum durability under extreme operating conditions.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! Engineered for the toughest jobs.

features.title: Heavy-Duty Formula
features.desc: CI-4 rated for modern diesel engines including turbocharged and EGR-equipped units.

features.title: Extreme Durability
features.desc: Maintains performance under high temperatures and heavy loads.

features.title: Extended Drain Intervals
features.desc: Advanced additive package supports longer oil change intervals.

features.title: Filipino-Made Quality
features.desc: Proudly manufactured in the Philippines for local conditions.

faqs.q: Is Laon Burst good for trucks?
faqs.a: Yes, Laon Burst is specifically formulated for trucks and heavy equipment with its CI-4 rating and 15W-40 viscosity.

faqs.q: Can I use this in my pickup truck?
faqs.a: If your pickup has a diesel engine that requires 15W-40 CI-4 oil, Laon Burst is an excellent choice.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
